area.value: one creature with 150 hp or less

duration.value: See text 50 or less 4d4 rounds 51-100 2d4 rounds 101-150 1d4 rounds

description.value: You utter a single word of power that instantly causes one creature of your choice to become stunned, whether the creature can hear the word or not. The duration of the spell depends on the target’s current hit point total. Any creature that currently has 151 or more hit points is unaffected by power word stun. Hit Points
